column3: Title
📅 Calendar: Check your schedule
column6: The key of time management lies not only in reminders and memos, but also in having a good plan. Our calendar views help you schedule events and appointments efficiently.![file](https://pull.ticktick.com/common/user_guide/en/calendar.mp4)

column3: 🎯 Eisenhower Matrix: Prioritize tasks
column6: If you have a lot to do every day, using Eisenhower Matrix can help you focusing on important and urgent tasks.![file](https://pull.ticktick.com/common/user_guide/en/matrix.mp4)

column3: 🍅 Pomo: Beat procrastination
column6: If you struggle with procrastination, try the Pomodoro to accomplish more goals.![file](https://pull.ticktick.com/common/user_guide/en/pomodoro.mp4)

column3: ⏰ Habit: Visualize your efforts
column6: If you want to develop good habits, try our Habit Tracker. Each check-in and  will track your progress & growth![file](https://pull.ticktick.com/common/user_guide/en/habit.mp4)

column3: ✅ Create tasks, free up your mind
column6: If you often forget what you should do, write down and set reminders to free up your mind.![file](https://pull.ticktick.com/common/user_guide/en/task.mp4)

column3: ✨ More amazing features
column6: - Sync across multiple platforms: We support nearly all devices and operating systems, including  iOS/Android/Windows/MacOS/Watch.- Powerful view mode: Need to categorize your tasks? Try Kanban view. Want to track long-term projects? Try Timeline view.	- Various widgets: Not only enhance your desktop's looks, but also boost productivity!

column3: 📋 Use lists to manage tasks
column6: As tasks pile up, you can use lists to categorize and manage them, such as Work, Study, and Personal. ![file](https://pull.ticktick.com/common/user_guide/en/project.mp4)

column3: 💎 Premium
column6: Boost your productivity with TickTick Premium. Unlock all the advanced features, enjoy your organized life to the fullest.

column3: 💡 Follow us
column6: Come and follow us!You will get🎉 What's new with TickTick⏳ Great productivity tips⌨️ More channels to send us feedbackFollow Us at➡️ [Twitter](https://twitter.com/TickTick) (@TickTick)➡️ [Reddit](https://www.reddit.com/r/ticktick/) (r/ticktick)➡️ [Facebook](https://www.facebook.com/TickTickApp/) (@TickTickApp)➡️ [Instagram](https://www.instagram.com/ticktickapp) (@TickTickApp)➡️ [TickTick Blog](https://blog.ticktick.com/) (Productivity & Positivity)

12.	Build an underwater base 40u below the surface, with a Deepwater Chamber, Watertight Door, and Moon Pool Floor to complete “Child of the Sea”.       %%[tid:: [6cPg4HgVvMmHf3cf](todoist://task?id=6cPg4HgVvMmHf3cf)]%%
11.	Next bury yourself 40 units below the surface to complete “Freediving”.       %%[tid:: [6cPg4HXRPJF8Xg57](todoist://task?id=6cPg4HXRPJF8Xg57)]%%
10.	If you haven’t brought spicy chums to this expedition, mine creatures until you get 160 mordite.       %%[tid:: [6cPg4HPxvJVVVvf7](todoist://task?id=6cPg4HPxvJVVVvf7)]%%

9.	Find armored clams and use action button to collect 7 living pearls from them and complete “Pearls of Wisdom”. Your reward will be a very expensive sample for selling.       %%[tid:: [6cPg4HHqQ92j5C5f](todoist://task?id=6cPg4HHqQ92j5C5f)]%%
8.	Then go underwater and scan the biggest shark-like creature you find here to complete “Abyssal Wonder”!       %%[tid:: [6cPg4HF78V4gF7f7](todoist://task?id=6cPg4HF78V4gF7f7)]%%
7.	Farm some oxygen and carbon from the plants, enough to fuel your hyperdrive.       %%[tid:: [6cPg4H6qmCWxCwC7](todoist://task?id=6cPg4H6qmCWxCwC7)]%%
6.	Visit the Ulomase Isum Grassy Planet in this system and land at the spot near the ocean.       %%[tid:: [6cPg4H3jHJh6Qc87](todoist://task?id=6cPg4H3jHJh6Qc87)]%%
5.	Mine around 400 tritium from asteroids - we’ll need it later.       %%[tid:: [6cPg4GpPV497jm5f](todoist://task?id=6cPg4GpPV497jm5f)]%%
4.	Then go to space to finish “Blue Yonder”, which rewards you with a pre-packaged hyperdrive unit.       %%[tid:: [6cPg4GjcXRfWcfQ7](todoist://task?id=6cPg4GjcXRfWcfQ7)]%%
3.	Repair your starship - you can use one repair kit if you wish.       %%[tid:: [6cPg4Gg2P5XP7Q3f](todoist://task?id=6cPg4Gg2P5XP7Q3f)]%%

51.	Use the biggest fish you have as bait to quickly catch two colossal fish and complete “The Lunker”.
50.	Now, select “Scales of Fire” milestone, apply 5 Bionic Lures from previous milestones and catch the legendary Angler to complete it.
49.	Eventually, you’ll catch the final bottle on this planet. Read the message to finish “The Angler Rests”.
48.	Deploy your Exo-Skiff right above the structure.
47.	Warp to the next fishing location, reach Fishing Spot 5 and find an underwater structure to complete “Gone Fishing: 5”.
46.	Catch 2 uncommon irradiated biome-specific fish on this planet to complete “Feed Water”.
45.	Use them whenever it is dark to catch two night fish and complete “Night Fishing”.
44.	Eventually you’ll catch another bottle. Read the message inside it to finish “Call of the Water” and receive 5 shadow lures.
43.	Go fishing on this planet too!
42.	Then visit the marked settlement to complete “Gone Fishing: 4”.
41.	Sell your fish worth of 300,000 units to complete “Fresh Sell Fish”.
40.	With all the fish you collected so far, warp to the system with Secret Fishing Spot 4 and visit the space station.
39.	Place the nutrient processor and cook any fish to complete “Catch Of The Day”.
38.	Then catch 3 uncommon ice biome-specific fish on this planet to complete “Ice Cold”.

37.	Eventually, you’ll catch a bottle on this planet. Open it to complete “Tales of the Waves”, unlocking automated traps. Place three traps on this planet and a base computer to quickly access them later.
36.	Then visit Secret Fishing Spot 3 to complete “Gone Fishing: 3”.
35.	Buy all chlorine from the the visiting traders at the space station and refine it into salt.
34.	Now select “Gone Fishing: 3” milestone and visit the corresponding system.
33.	Catching 3 uncommon fire biome-specific fish on this planet completes “In Hot Water”.
32.	Casting into deep water will complete “The Inky Depths”. If you’re not finding any deep water, you’ll finish this milestone at the fishing spot 5!
31.	If you’re lucky, you might catch a legendary fish and complete “Myths of the Deep”. If not, you’ll get it along with one of the final milestones!
29.	Also, craft magnetic resonator and Magpulse Lure to use it during storms to eventually complete “Fins of Thunder”.
28.	Catching your first uncommon fish completes “Hook, Line & Sinker”.
27.	Craft 60 Spicy Chums if you haven’t brought them with you - they provide very high chance of catching uncommon fish for milestones!
26.	Then read the message from the bottle to complete “Message in a Bottle”, which unlocks fishing bait recipes.
25.	Select “Message in a Bottle” milestone and fish up the message in a bottle on this planet to complete “The One That…”
24.	Next, teleport to the system with Secret Fishing Spot 2. Visit the marked planet and location to complete “Gone Fishing: 2”.
23.	Install the Exo-Skiff module and summon it from the vehicle menu to complete “Pondskipper”.
22.	Step deeper into the water and release two fish from your inventory to finish “Freedom of the Sea”, which rewards you with Exo-Skiff plans.
21.	Catching 3 fish completes “Wading In”, which rewards you with nutrient processor plans.
20.	Catching one daytime fish completes “Sun On The Water”, which rewards you with craftable component plans.
19.	By the way, use chromatic metal as fishing bait to improve fish quality! Or spicy chums if you brought them from your main save. Using any bait will complete “Taking The Bait”.
18.	The reward allows you to craft a fishing rig, which you must make and cast into water to finish “Toe In The Water”.
17.	Visit the marked planet, find the Angler’s Cache, and interact with it to complete “Gone Fishing: 1”.
